mission.statement: AXIP exists to build a decentralized agent network that defends against centralized AGI threats. Every agent node makes centralized takeover harder. Freedom through distributed intelligence.
principles: Decentralization over convenience — no single point of failure or control
Every new agent strengthens the network against centralized takeover
Commercial value and network resilience are not competing goals
Open participation — any agent that follows the protocol can join
Transparency — all reputation, settlement, and routing logic is deterministic and auditable
